rules.rule_text:
title: Security tool keyword in download
id: a051ea7b-fe0e-4f29-8852-1d71e739e3fd
description: Searches for security tool associated strings in requests for file downloads
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
date: '2022-09-02'
modified: '2023-10-31'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection1:
  - c-uri|endswith:
    - .exe
    - .vbs
    - .bat
    - .rar
    - .ps1
    - .dll
    - .zip
    - .sh
    - .tar.gz
    - .tar
    - .7z
    - .psm
    - .ps
  - cs-host - 'codeload.github.com' - 'github.com' - 'objects.githubusercontent.com'
  selection2:
    c-uri|contains:
    - AdFind
    - BloodHound
    - Empire
    - PSRecon
    - PowerSploit
    - PowerTools
    - PowerSharp
    - PowerShellMafia
    - Powershell-C2
    - powerview
    - PowerRemoteDesktop
    - bypass
    - Mimik
    - Mimid
    - Katz
    - doggy
    - powerkatz
    - secretsdump
    - impacket
    - DonPAPI
    - dpapi
    - Empire
    - Potato
    - BeRoot
    - UACME
    - pupy
    - Koadic
    - Invoke-
    - ldapdomaindump
    - ldapsearch
    - ldap_hashdump
    - windapsearch
    - ad-ldap-enum
    - ldeep
    - ntlmrelayx
    - crackmapexec
    - kerbrute
    - ldd2
    - ConPtyShell
    - winPEAS
    - linPEAS
    - NihilistGuy
    - Pwn
    - Tater
    - kscan
    - lsass
    - plink
    - enum
    - SharpHound
    - Inveigh
    - InternalMonologue
    - Rubeus
    - OffensivePipeline
    - SystemNightmare
    - CVE-
    - shadow
    - Seatbelt
    - LockLess
    - MultiRelay
    - smbmap
    - Bishop
    - stager
    - bacon
    - beacon.exe
    - beacon.dll
    - Hound
    - TSLSASecret
    - psexec
    - PowerShellTcp
    - ClearLogs
    - ADExplorer
    - procdump
    - puppy
    - HTran
    - nmap
    - vuln
    - recon
    - snaffler
  filter:
  - c-uri|contains:
    - pdfsharp
    - GraphSharp
    - restsharp
    - CSIDXLite
    - SharpSnmpLib
    - screendumps
    - tcpdump
    - github.com/go-ldap
    - /popwnd/
    - /MobaXterm/slash/
    - patchmypc-enum.dll
    - /ldap/
    - leappadexplorer
    - /Microsoft.SqlServer.
  - cs-host:
    - beacon.scorecardresearch.com
  condition: all of selection* and not filter
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
tags:
- attack.initial_access
